name: Iblis, The Flames of Disaster, First form
description:

In a ruined future, Iblis wanders the lava-filled streets of Crisis City, either searching for life or just wandering aimlessly.

puhleeeaaassse this was gen hard to make, At least with Ifrit i had some idea on cooking but this.. auh its probably gonna end up trying to fight and kill you just saying so dont even bother to befirend him...

On the topic of Bin the Dynamite Duck request and Boomer the turtle... I have rejected those requests. There really just is not much for me to work with for them without basically making them into ocs. I struggled to even make this one since there really is so little on it personality wise, half the personality is its appearance and how it attacks for those that wanna fight him.

For anyone wondering, yes i have a personality for Mephiles so dont feel bad for requesting him in the future if u do.

ty for requesting
